'''Alec Lamere''' was a [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of [[House Barnaba]].

==Biography==
Lamere was one of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] best known [[Saber rake/Legends|saber rakes]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial era]]. Although he was not described as an attractive man, he was very popular among young noble ladies who were attracted to dangerous men. Alec was a deadly duelist, whose apparent clumsiness would disappear when he ignited his [[Lightfoil/Legends|lightfoil]]. Even before Alec had reached eighteen years of age, very few who had fought him had walked away unharmed. He did, however, have a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic left arm]] as a result of a duel.<ref name="LOTE" />

His family intended for him to be sent to the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] on [[Raithal/Legends|Raithal]] when he became eighteen to get him out of the sector due to the trouble his perpetual dueling caused.<ref name="LOTE" />
